member.summary: Select the Relayed Connection Encryption Mode

member.summary: Photon Session EmptyRoomTTL in milliseconds. Valid only in Shared Mode.

member.summary: Returns a copy of the current object.

member.summary: Returns a string that represents the current object.

member.name: T:Fusion.Photon.Realtime.PhotonAppSettings
member.summary: Collection of connection-relevant settings, used internally by PhotonNetwork.ConnectUsingSettings.
member.remarks: Includes the AppSettings class from the Realtime APIs plus some other, PUN-relevant, settings.

member.name: F:Fusion.Photon.Realtime.PhotonAppSettings.AppSettings
member.summary: The photon settings class, which is wrapped by this ScriptableObject.

member.name: P:Fusion.Photon.Realtime.PhotonAppSettings.Global
member.summary: Serialized server settings, written by the Setup Wizard for use in ConnectUsingSettings.

member.summary: Try to get the global settings
member.returns: True if the settings are loaded, false otherwise

member.summary: Check if the global settings are loaded

member.summary: Send data to another Actor on the Room
member.param: Flag to set reliability on the Event
member.returns: True if the event was sent, false otherwise

member.summary: Build Enter Room and Join Room Args
member.param: Which lobby the Room should exits
Room Name, if not set, a Random Name will be used
Set the max number of players per Session
Signal if the Session should be Open/Closed
Signal if the Session should Visible/Invisible
Signal if the Session should have an extended Time To Live

member.summary: Convert a into a pair of and respectively representing the custom properties of a session and the property names that will be published on the Lobby
member.param: Hashtable with all allowed Custom Properties
String array with all public key names

member.name: M:Fusion.SessionProperty.Convert(System.Object)
member.summary: Convert a particular object into a . Check the object type support using . If the object type is not supported, will be thrown.
member.returns: Instance of a if type is supported, null otherwise
member.exception: If the object type passed as argument is not supported
